untranslatable_reason: Morning Doji Star pattern recognition requires candlestick pattern detection (doji identification, specific candle sequence validation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. The pattern requires: (1) identifying a doji candle, (2) validating the specific 3-candle sequence structure, and (3) confirming both primary and secondary downtrends. These pattern-level validations are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Breakout conditions translated to price action relative to preceding candle highs/lows using prev_high/prev_low. However, the core Morning Doji Star pattern formation requirement cannot be validated without explicit candlestick pattern detection capability. Entry/exit conditions represent the breakout logic only, not the pattern confirmation itself.
